description:
2024 Mercedes-Benz SL 55 AMG 4MATIC+, 4.0 TT V8, AWD, 469 bhp, 9-Speed Dual-Clutch Automatic. AED 489,000 or AED 7,661 / Month with a 20% Down payment for 5 Years. 
 - Mileage 9,500 KMs - Mercedes Warranty Valid Until 9th July 2029 or 105,000 KMs - Mercedes Service Contract Valid Until 10th July 2029 or 105,000 KMs - Full Agency Service History - GCC Specs 
 - Manufuktur Silicon Grey Paint - Full PPF - 21-inch AMG Multi-Spoke Light-Alloy Wheels - Night Package - LED Headlights with Adaptive Highbeam - Power Retractable Soft-Top Roof in Red - Surround View - Manufaktur Roof Liner in Black - Active Aerodynamics - Interior Carbon Fiber Trim - Premium Leather Upholstery Interior - Heated and Ventilated Seats (Front) - Massage Seats - Dual-Zone Automatic Climate Control - MBUX with Dual 12.3” Screens - Touchpad and Voice Control - Apple CarPlay - Android Auto - Ambient Lighting - Burmester 3D Surround Sound System - Wireless Charging - Heads-Up Display - Active Brake Assist - Blind Spot Assist - Active Lane Keeping Assist - Distronic Plus (Adaptive Cruise Control) - Surround View System - Parktronic with Active Parking Assist - AMG Performance Exhaust System with electronically controlled flaps - AMG Sport Steering Wheel with Nappa Leather and Brushed Aluminum Paddle Shifters - Steering Wheel with Touch Control Buttons - Power-Adjustable Steering Column - Keyless Go WHY BLACKLINE MOTOR COMPANY? We don't just sell cars; we hand select the finest automotive inventory in the UAE. Every Blackline vehicle undergoes a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it exceeds expectations. Trade-Ins & Consignment Welcome: Top market rates for your current vehicle. Flexible Finance: Several deposit options available. Expertise: Over 50 years of combined luxury automotive experience. VISIT OUR BOUTIQUE SHOWROOM Showroom 54, Block 6, Ras Al Khor, Dubai. https://goo.gl/maps/qZDyUVUkA4hAzZc9A OPEN 7 DAYS A WEEK Monday – Sunday: 10:00 AM – 8:00 PM CONTACT THE TEAM: •
